name: @opensin/neural-bus
description: OpenSIN Neural Bus SDK and OpenCode MCP server.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/src && bun build --target=node --format=cjs --outdir=dist/src src/index.ts src/mcp-server.ts
scripts.test: bun run build && bun run test:node && bun run test:py

author: OpenSIN-AI Collective
